content:
好的，我来给你出一道 Java 面试题！

先激活知识检索工具，从题库中搜索。
[tool_call: reset_equipped_tools({"to_activate":["knowledge_retrieval","utility"]})]

[tool_result: reset_equipped_tools] The currently activated tool group(s): knowledge_retrieval, utility.
<tool-instructions>
<group name="knowledge_retrieval">知识检索工具组 — 搜索面试题库、优秀答案、公司面经、学习资源</group>
<group name="utility">通用工具组 — 进度追踪、薪资查询</group>
</tool-instructions>
[tool_result: search_questions] Error: Unauthorized tool call: 'search_questions' is not available

[tool_result: reset_equipped_tools] The currently activated tool group(s): knowledge_retrieval, utility, interview.
<tool-instructions>
<group name="knowledge_retrieval">知识检索工具组 — 搜索面试题库、优秀答案、公司面经、学习资源</group>
<group name="utility">通用工具组 — 进度追踪、薪资查询</group>
<group name="interview">面试工具组 — 模拟面试、回答分析、录音转写</group>
</tool-instructions>
[tool_result: search_questions] Error: Unauthorized tool call: 'search_questions' is not available
[tool_call: agent_spawn({"task":"请搜索高质量的Java面试题，从题库中检索一些经典的Java面试题，包括题目、考察要点。选择一个有代表性的返回给我。最好涵盖核心Java知识点如集合、并发、JVM等。","agent_id":"knowledge_searcher","timeout_seconds":30})]
